name: Green Chile Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast and peel the poblano chiles (see Sowest1).
2. Trim excess fat from lamb shoulder.
3. Cut lamb into 1-inch cubes.
4. Cook and stir lamb, onion, and garlic in oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven until lamb is no longer pink; drain.
5. Stir in broth, salt, juniper berries, and pepper.
6. Heat to boiling. Reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender (about 1 hour).
8. In a tightly covered container, mix flour and water.
9. Stir the flour mixture into the lamb.
10. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
11. Stir in chiles.
12. Sprinkle each serving with lemon peel.
